review.reason: Capability-tree organization, retrieval, orchestration, and benchmark structure may help catalog operations and critic checks after review gates are stronger.
review.action: Inspect README, license, benchmark data, scripts, dependency graph, and whether organization concepts can inform local catalog reports or critic checks.

catalog.reason: Normalizer added a new high-risk reviewed local skill derived from the MCP risk audit; catalog and install surfaces need rebuild/reconciliation before package or publication endorsement.
catalog.action: Blocked in connector-only run: run or reproduce npm run build:catalog from a checked-out repository, then verify the new skill appears with high risk and requires_review metadata or explicitly document why it remains canonical-only. A CI-backed catalog refresh workflow now exists at .github/workflows/catalog-refresh.yml, but generated catalog surfaces remain blocked until that workflow or a checked-out builder run actually refreshes and verifies them.
catalog.blocked_by: Generated catalog surfaces still require an executed catalog build. A CI-backed workflow was added, but generated-surface parity has not yet been verified.

catalog.reason: Packager found install-facing metric drift: dist/catalog.md reports 1173 skills and 2 high-risk entries while dist/catalog.json reports 1170 skills and 1 high-risk entry.
catalog.action: Blocked pending an actual catalog build: run workflow_dispatch for .github/workflows/catalog-refresh.yml or run npm run build:catalog from a checked-out repository, then verify catalog.json, catalog.md, install-manifest.json, and reports agree before Packager or Publisher endorsement.
catalog.blocked_by: The CI-backed catalog refresh path exists, but the generated surfaces remain unreconciled until the workflow or a local checkout executes scripts/build_distribution_catalog.py and commits or verifies the generated files.

packaging.reason: Agent Skills is a reviewed open package format relevant to local skill distribution; compatibility should be checked after catalog drift is resolved.
packaging.action: Blocked: do not perform or endorse Agent Skills compatibility until catalog surfaces are reconciled and generated install metadata is trustworthy.
packaging.blocked_by: Catalog/package gate remains unresolved: dist/catalog.md reports 1173 skills and 2 high-risk entries while dist/catalog.json reports 1170 skills and 1 high-risk entry; the high-risk MCP skill is still not reflected across generated catalog/install surfaces.

maintenance.reason: Connector-only operator runs can inspect and write repository files but cannot execute npm run build:catalog, which leaves generated catalog surfaces blocked when drift occurs.
maintenance.action: Created .github/workflows/catalog-refresh.yml to provide a workflow_dispatch and path-triggered CI-backed catalog refresh path for future Cataloger passes.

maintenance.target: operations/daily/2026-07-02/critic.md, doctrine/normalization-pipeline.md, reports, skills catalog review criteria
maintenance.reason: Reviewed benchmark evidence suggests many skills may provide little benefit or even harm when version-mismatched; the local skill library needs evidence-aware validation and pruning criteria.
maintenance.action: Derived local evidence-aware validation and pruning criteria in operations/daily/2026-07-02/critic.md without copying benchmark task prompts, skill documents, code, tests, datasets, Docker images, scripts, or paper text.
